---
title: "Catalogue of books in the library of Sir William Heathcote, Bart., M.P., at Hursley Park, in the county of Southampton"
---

## Catalogue of books in the library of Sir William Heathcote, Bart., M.P., at Hursley Park, in the county of Southampton

**Author:** James Darling
**Date:** 1865
**Imprint:** London: Darling

### Notes

A revised version of the edition of 1834

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
